prompt:
A cinematic retro-futuristic propaganda poster of Elon Musk standing confidently at the center of a massive futuristic metropolis inspired by advanced space-age architecture and sci-fi innovation. He wears a sleek black coat and dark minimalist clothing, gazing upward heroically with a visionary expression. The composition is designed like a vintage magazine cover or dystopian future recruitment poster with bold oversized typography reading “ELON MUSK” across the top in giant cream-colored condensed letters.
The background features an epic red-orange Martian sky with a giant glowing planet Mars dominating the horizon, surrounded by satellites, rockets, spacecraft, flying vehicles, and futuristic skyscrapers. A massive reusable rocket launches upward beside him with glowing engines and industrial launch towers inspired by SpaceX technology. Futuristic cityscapes filled with monorails, hyperloop-style trains, solar farms, advanced transportation systems, neon-lit towers, and sci-fi infrastructure stretch across the scene.
At the bottom foreground are sleek Tesla-inspired electric cars, futuristic transit tunnels, astronauts walking toward Mars, and multiple technology company emblems integrated into the design like SpaceX, Tesla, Neuralink, Starlink, and The Boring Company. The poster includes motivational slogans, inspirational quotes, and visionary taglines about building the future, expanding humanity to Mars, sustainable energy, and technological progress.
Style: ultra-detailed retro sci-fi illustration, vintage propaganda poster aesthetics, cinematic lighting, distressed paper texture, bold graphic composition, sepia and burnt-orange color palette, gritty grain, highly detailed linework, futuristic industrial realism, dramatic contrast, inspirational and legendary atmosphere, stop-scrolling viral poster design, magazine-cover quality, symmetrical cinematic framing, high detail, 8k resolution.
